base_url.description: Your Grafana instance's URL, e.g. https://your-grafana.grafana.net. No default: a Grafana instance must be named explicitly (per-tenant, matching legacy's config url/base_url).

api_key.description: Grafana service account token or API key, sent as Authorization: Bearer <api_key>; never logged.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
